title: Settings
keepCurrentValue: Leave empty to keep the current value
orgAccessHint: Manage who has privileged access to this organisation. Organisation roles control administrative capabilities like managing tenants, members, and billing. Regular users only need tenant-level access.
orgMembersHint: Manage who has access to this organisation and its tenants. Organisation admins can manage members and create new tenants.
noOrganization: No organisation found for your account.
